description_long: This internet cafe features a compact, rectangular layout with a wooden floor and two distinct wall textures: one with a black-and-white geometric pattern and another with a brick motif. The interior is equipped with two computer stations, each with a chair and a monitor, arranged side by side facing the patterned wall. A small counter or reception desk is positioned near the entrance, with a blue accent visible on its side. The space is open, with no visible doors or windows, and the overall design is functional and minimalistic. The walls and floor are constructed from solid materials, while the furniture appears to be made of metal and plastic. The color palette is dominated by wood tones, black, white, and blue accents.
description: A compact internet cafe with two computer stations, a patterned wall, and a wooden floor, featuring minimalistic furnishings and blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing two computer stations facing a black-and-white patterned wall, with a small counter to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arrangement of the computer stations and the depth of the space, with the counter visible at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the brick-patterned wall and the back of one computer station, with minimal interior detail visible.
description_view_3: Side view dominated by the plain wall, with only the tops of the computer stations and monitors visible above the partition.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Two computer stations are clearly visible from the interior views, arranged side by side with chairs and monitors.
